items.title: Former FBI director charged with threatening Trump's life in Instagram post
items.raw_content: The new case stems from a 2025 seashell photo posted by the former FBI director that the justice department says calls for violence against Trump.
items.ai_summary: 前FBI局长因在Instagram发布贝壳照片被指控威胁特朗普生命，司法部称其煽动暴力。

items.title: Five takeaways from the King's historic address to Congress
items.raw_content: There were some lines in the speech that may have buoyed Democrats – and raised eyebrows in the White House.
items.ai_summary: 国王在历史性国会演讲中发表的一些言论可能提振了民主党，并在白宫引发关注。

items.title: King gets ovation for Congress speech warning of volatile world
items.raw_content: He tells US lawmakers his address comes the two nations' relationship is "more important" than ever "in times of great uncertainty".
items.ai_summary: 英国国王在美国国会发表演讲，强调在动荡世界中英美关系的重要性，获全场起立鼓掌。

items.title: In pictures: King joins Trump for White House banquet and delivers historic Congress speech
items.raw_content: King Charles III and Queen Camilla continued their state visit to the US with a White House state dinner and a speech from the King to Congress.
items.ai_summary: 查尔斯三世国王和卡米拉王后继续对美进行国事访问，参加白宫国宴并在国会发表演讲。

items.title: How the King and Queen spent their second day in the US
items.raw_content: During the White House state dinner, the King gifted the US president a bell from his WW2 submarine namesake, 'HMS Trump'.
items.ai_summary: 英国国王和王后访美第二天：白宫国宴上国王赠予美国总统潜艇同名钟。

items.title: Fashion, billionaires and jokes: Inside the White House state dinner for the King and Queen
items.raw_content: The night was filled with designer fashion, luscious bouquets, billionaire guests and joke-filled speeches.
items.ai_summary: 白宫国宴款待英国国王和王后，现场时尚、鲜花、亿万富翁嘉宾和幽默演讲。

items.title: Billie Eilish puts Manchester at centre of new 3D concert film
items.raw_content: Teaming up with filmmaking giant James Cameron, the superstar creates a unique love letter to her fans.
items.ai_summary: 比莉·艾利什与詹姆斯·卡梅隆合作，创作了一部以曼彻斯特为中心的3D演唱会电影。

items.title: A fresh financial crisis may be coming - it won't play out like the last one
items.raw_content: Several warning lights are flashing that have some wondering whether we are in the foothills of another financial crisis.
items.ai_summary: 多个警示信号表明可能即将发生新的金融危机，但本次危机将不同于以往。

items.title: Early care scheme could prevent thousands of miscarriages a year
items.raw_content: Current rules state that three unsuccessful pregnancies are needed to trigger NHS support - but a pilot project could bring about change.
items.ai_summary: 早期护理计划每年可预防数千例流产，目前需要三次流产才能获得NHS支持，试点项目可能改变这一规定。

items.title: Zhao fights back to tie Murphy heading into final session
items.raw_content: Defending champion Zhao Xintong fights back against Shaun Murphy to leave their World Championship quarter-final delicately poised at 8-8 heading into Wednesday's concluding session.
items.ai_summary: 斯诺克世锦赛四分之一决赛：卫冕冠军赵心童8-8战平肖恩·墨菲，最后一局定胜负。
